title: Cross-Chain Bridges
description: Cross-chain bridges move or represent assets between Bitcoin and other networks using custodians, federations, multisig committees, light-client proofs, or cryptographic verification. Their security depends on the bridge mechanism rather than Bitcoin alone.

resources.title: Bitcoin Layer Two Resources
resources.notes: Curated overview of bridge designs including Interlay, Threshold, and Wrapped Bitcoin.

resources.title: Interlay
resources.notes: Example of a trust-minimized cross-chain Bitcoin bridge design.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Background for Bitcoin transactions, multisig, and cross-system trust assumptions.
